Package GuessGame

package GuessGame
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Guesser
    Guesser - It takes input from guesser using Scanner class.
    GuesserGame
    GuesserGame - A simple Guesser game.
    Player
    Player - Player class has logic of taking input from players using Scanner class.
    Umpire
    Umpire - The Umpire class controls the flow of the guessing game.
